title: Validate And Close Core Removable Plan Reference Cleanup
summary: Runs derived-surface rebuild, validation, and regression checks; classifies the remaining necessary plan references in core; and closes the initiative.
scope_items: Run plan sync all after the core wording cleanup.
Run repository validation and narrowed regression coverage for the updated core corpus.
Classify remaining core plan references as required current-repo facts, mirror contracts, or pack-owned live surfaces before closeout.
done_when_items: Derived surfaces rebuild cleanly after the shared-core wording updates.
Validation and targeted regression coverage pass.
The initiative is closed with only necessary plan references left in core.
